tests.test_body: define float @ret_fmul_ieee_nozero_nonan__nozero_nonan_noinf(float nofpclass(nan zero) %arg0, float nofpclass(nan inf zero) %arg1) {
define float @ret_fmul_ieee_nozero_nonan__noinf_nonan(float nofpclass(nan zero) %arg0, float nofpclass(nan inf) %arg1) {
define float @ret_fmul_ieee_noinf_nonan__nozero_nonan(float nofpclass(nan inf) %arg0, float nofpclass(nan zero) %arg1) {
define float @ret_fmul_ieee_noinf_nonan__nozero(float nofpclass(nan inf) %arg0, float nofpclass(zero) %arg1) {
define float @ret_fmul_ieee_nozero_nonan_noinf__nonan(float nofpclass(nan inf zero) %arg0, float nofpclass(nan) %arg1) {
define float @ret_fmul_ieee_nonan__nozero_nonan_noinf(float nofpclass(nan) %arg0, float nofpclass(nan inf zero) %arg1) {
define i1 @simplify_fcmp_ord_fmul_caller(double nofpclass(nan inf zero) %i0, double nofpclass(nan inf zero) %i1) {

define i1 @issue63316_commute(i64 %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @issue63316_commute(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SITOFP:%.*]] = sitofp i64 [[ARG:%.*]] to float
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[FMUL:%.*]] = fmul float 0x7FF0000000000000, [[SITOFP]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[FCMP:%.*]] = fcmp uno float [[FMUL]], 0.000000e+00
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[FCMP]]
  %sitofp = sitofp i64 %arg to float
  %fmul = fmul float 0x7FF0000000000000, %sitofp
  %fcmp = fcmp uno float %fmul, 0.000000e+00
  ret i1 %fcmp
}

define i1 @issue63316(i64 %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @issue63316(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SITOFP:%.*]] = sitofp i64 [[ARG:%.*]] to float
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[FMUL:%.*]] = fmul float [[SITOFP]], 0x7FF0000000000000
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[FCMP:%.*]] = fcmp uno float [[FMUL]], 0.000000e+00
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[FCMP]]
  %sitofp = sitofp i64 %arg to float
  %fmul = fmul float %sitofp, 0x7FF0000000000000
  %fcmp = fcmp uno float %fmul, 0.000000e+00
  ret i1 %fcmp
}

issue.title: Instcombine incorrectly optimizes `fcmp uno`
issue.body:
After this commit: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/e47b76a82a0300900dbf3c2d3a50552a76305a8c running `opt -passes=instcombine` on the following IR:
```
define i1 @test(i64 %arg) {
  %sitofp = sitofp i64 %arg to float
  %fmul = fmul float %sitofp, 0x7FF0000000000000
  %fcmp = fcmp uno float %fmul, 0.000000e+00
  ret i1 %fcmp
}
```
results in
```
define i1 @test(i64 %arg) {
  ret i1 false
}
```
That's not correct because `fcmp uno` returns true if either argument is NaN and by IEEE-754 multiplication of infinity (aka `0x7FF0000000000000`) and 0 (`sitofp i64 %arg to float` with `%arg == 0`) is NaN. Alive2 points out exactly this case: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/5rPFgH
issue.author: DaniilSuchkov

comments.author: arsenm
comments.body: Not sure why it didn't auto-close after the commit
